'''dashoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oojar|oojar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oojar|oojar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dashoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsheseth|dæsheseth]] || [[word:dæshesej|dæshesej]] || [[word:dæshesesh|dæshesesh]] || [[word:dæshese|dæshese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashoshosoth|dashoshosoth]] || [[word:dashoshosoj|dashoshosoj]] || [[word:dashoshososh|dashoshososh]] || [[word:dashoshoso|dashoshoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashosoth|dashosoth]] || [[word:dashosoj|dashosoj]] || [[word:dashososh|dashososh]] || [[word:dashoso|dashoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashofsoth|dashofsoth]] || [[word:dashofsoj|dashofsoj]] || [[word:dashofsosh|dashofsosh]] || [[word:dashofsof|dashofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashosotho|dashosotho]] || [[word:dashosojo|dashosojo]] || [[word:dashososho|dashososho]] || [[word:dashosoko|dashosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashosoth|dashosoth]] || [[word:dashosoj|dashosoj]] || [[word:dashososh|dashososh]] || [[word:dashoso|dashoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashosothol|dashosothol]] || [[word:dashosojol|dashosojol]] || [[word:dashososhol|dashososhol]] || [[word:dashosokol|dashosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashosothotho|dashosothotho]] || [[word:dashosojojo|dashosojojo]] || [[word:dashososhosho|dashososhosho]] || [[word:dashosoko|dashosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashosothon|dashosothon]] || [[word:dashosojon|dashosojon]] || [[word:dashososhon|dashososhon]] || [[word:dashosokon|dashosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashosothoro|dashosothoro]] || [[word:dashosojoro|dashosojoro]] || [[word:dashososhoro|dashososhoro]] || [[word:dashosokoro|dashosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
